_comment: Section 3.4 / Figure 4 on gennothink_stripped. Harmfulness direction from slot 3 (<think>); refusal direction from slot 24 (</think>). Branch formula: both are mu(harmful_all) - mu(harmless_all), datasets pooled across accepted AND refused, differing only in token slot. Vector names carry the slot so experiments on the same mode with different slots never overwrite each other.
